title: How can I present a summary of task assigned
excerpt: I need to present a summary to my manager that I’ve been working in my task, status Working on it, he has no time to read my updates but he wants to know I am still working and the progress, also he wants to know the tas…

posts.author: Beatriz (Osorio )
posts.cookedHtml: I need to present a summary to my manager that I’ve been working in my task, status Working on it, he has no time to read my updates but he wants to know I am still working and the progress, also he wants to know the task I postponed the due date and understand the frequency I postponed the task. Is they any dashboard you can suggest or any other option.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Beatriz

Welcome to the community!

A good place to start could be creating a filtered view to show only the high level and specific details your manager would like to see, and share the view with them, so they can check your status out anytime and it will always be up to date.

Let me know if you’re not sure how!
Happy to chat all things monday.com any time.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Beatriz

Thanks for reaching out to the community! By using the Project Tracker dashboard on monday.com, the process of sharing your project updates and status becomes easier. With this dashboard, your stakeholders can monitor project timelines and milestones, and instantly address delays and bottlenecks. Also, it helps in reducing risk exposure, since stakeholders can spot things that could off-road your project before they occur.

If you’re seeking help to set up this dashboard, hire monday.com consultants from a reputable partner company. Depending on the scope of your projects and technical requirements, they can effectively customize and implement the dashboard.
